title: lulia nervosa
intro: Lulia nervosa, also known as the 'Angel's Trumpet', is a plant species that belongs to the Solanaceae family and is native to South America. The plant contains solanine, a toxic alkaloid, but it also has medicinal properties, including antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Lulia nervosa include reducing anxiety, promoting relaxation, and relieving symptoms of menopause and other hormonal imbalances. Herbal preparations of Lulia nervosa can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, but caution should be exercised due to its toxicity, and it should only be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
